zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Lawson於大約1597年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆時，她的父親James Conyers Lawson23歲，母親Jane Conyers22歲。她於1617年5月4日與Richard Braithwaite在英國達勒姆賀沃--斯結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1633年在英國英格蘭越可爾卡特利可享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾卡特利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Lawson于大约1597年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆时，她的父亲James Conyers Lawson23岁，母亲Jane Conyers22岁。她于1617年5月4日与Richard Braithwaite在英国達勒姆賀沃--斯结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1633年在英国英格兰越可爾卡特利可享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾卡特利可。

nameMeanings.name: Lawson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic ‘son of Lawrence’; see   Law   1. It is also found in Ireland since the 17th century.
Americanized form of Swedish   Larsson   and Danish, Norwegian or North German   Larsen  .

variants.name: Law
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from a Middle English personal name Law(e), a short form of Lawrence .

Scottish and northern English: topographic name for someone who lived near a hill, northern Middle English law (from Old English hlāw, which generally became low in the south and law in the north). Compare Lowe and Lew .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 羅, based on its Cantonese pronunciation, see   Luo   1.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Lawson was born about 1597, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Conyers Lawson, was 23 and her mother, Jane Conyers, was 22. She married Richard Braithwaite on 4 May 1617, in Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1633, in Catterick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Catterick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Lawson est née environ 1597, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Conyers Lawson, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Jane Conyers, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Braithwaite le 4 mai 1617, à Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1633, à Catterick, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Catterick, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Frances Lawson um 1597 in Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Conyers Lawson 23 und ihre Mutter Jane Conyers 22. Sie hat am 4. Mai 1617 in Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England Richard Braithwaite geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1633 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Catterick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Catterick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Lawson è nata il circa 1597 nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Conyers Lawson, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Jane Conyers, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Richard Braithwaite il 4 maggio 1617, nel Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1633, nel Catterick, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Catterick, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Lawsonが約1597年にイギリスイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父James Conyers Lawsonは23歳，母Jane Conyersは22歳であった。1617年5月4日にイギリスダルハムハルウオルス-オン-ティーズでRichard Braithwaiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1633年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカッテリックで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカッテリックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Lawson(이)가 대략 1597년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Conyers Lawson(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Conyers(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1617년 5월 4일 영국 뒤람 허워스--티스에서 Richard Braithwaite(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1633년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 카테릭에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 카테릭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Lawson nasceu aproximadamente 1597, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Conyers Lawson, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Jane Conyers, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Braithwaite em 4 de maio de 1617, em Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1633, em Catterick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Catterick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Lawson родилась около 1597 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Conyers Lawson было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Conyers, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Braithwaite 4 мая 1617 г. в местности хурворт-он-тись, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1633 г. в местности каттирикк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности каттирикк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Frances Lawson nació aproximadamente 1597, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Conyers Lawson, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Jane Conyers, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Richard Braithwaite el 4 de mayo de 1617, en Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1633, en Catterick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Catterick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
